THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER RIMON, P.C. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT WHITMAN PARTNERS, L.P. $44,850.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $44,850.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-09-2017 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER RIMON, P.C.'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189, EMAIL: CKAREN@SFTC.ORG; DEPT. 302.

DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER RIMON, P.C.'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD ON THE LAW & MOTION CALENDAR AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 302 ON THE SAME DATE.JUDGE PRO TEM: ROGER MEAD ; CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY; NOT REPORTED.=302/JPT

calendar.matters:
Petitioner Rimon. P.C.'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brian T. Hafter, of Rimon, P.C., Tel. 415.964.5207, for petitioners;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Petitioner Rimon, P.C.'s Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Hearing On Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance, The Court adopted it's tentative ruling; PETITIONER RIMON, P.C.'s Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award IS Transferred to be heard on the Law & Motion Calendar at 9:30 a.m. in Department 302 on the same date.Judge Pro tem: Roger Mead ; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported.=302/jpt
